blog.title: Blog
blog.empty: No posts yet. Write one yourself or let AI draft it for you.
blog.creditsLeft: {remaining} of {limit} AI posts left this month
blog.deleteConfirm: Delete this post? This cannot be undone.
blog.upgradeTitle: AI blog writing is a paid feature
blog.upgradeBody: Upgrade to Starter (5 AI posts/month) or Pro (30 AI posts/month) and let Contentor write for you.
blog.regenerateConfirm: Regenerate this post from scratch? This uses 1 AI credit and replaces the current text.
blog.instructionsPlaceholder: Anything specific you want it to cover?
blog.generating: Writing your post — this takes about half a minute…
blog.errQuota: You're out of AI posts for this month.
blog.errGeneric: Something went wrong — your credit was not used.
blog.autopilotHint: Contentor picks a topic and writes for you on a schedule.
blog.autopilotReview: Save as draft and notify me — recommended

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.selectConversationDescription: Pick a conversation from the list to read it.
inbox.deleteDescription: This removes the entire thread. You can't undo this.
inbox.upsellBanner: Add a custom domain to receive replies from your students.
inbox.sendError: Could not send the message. Please try again.
inbox.replyError: Could not send reply. Please try again.
inbox.archiveError: Could not archive. Please try again.
inbox.spamError: Could not mark as spam. Please try again.
inbox.deleteError: Could not delete. Please try again.

setup.title: Get your studio live
setup.celebrateBody: Everything is set up. Share your site with your students!

page_home.title: Home page
page_home.description: Make the first thing visitors see yours.

page_about.title: About page
page_about.description: Tell your story in your own words.

page_courses.title: Programs page
page_courses.description: Check how your programs are presented.

page_pricing.title: Pricing page
page_pricing.description: Review the plans your students will see.

page_faq.title: FAQ page
page_faq.description: Answer the questions students ask most.

page_contact.title: Contact page
page_contact.description: Make sure students can reach you.

look.title: Pick your look
look.description: Choose your colors, font and logo.

first_course.title: Create your first course
first_course.description: Replace the examples with something of your own.

demo_cleanup.title: Remove the demo content
demo_cleanup.description: Clear the example courses, photos and videos.

payouts.title: Set up how you get paid
payouts.description: Connect payouts so students can buy from you.

publish.title: Publish your site
publish.description: Flip the switch when you are ready for the world.

first_download.title: Add a download
first_download.description: Share a worksheet, plan or guide.

first_live.title: Schedule a live session
first_live.description: Put your first class on the calendar.

share_site.title: Share your site
share_site.description: Copy your link and send it to your students.

studio_email.title: Pick your studio email address
studio_email.description: Get your own address for student mail.

erase.title: Remove demo content?
erase.body: This removes the example content that came with your site:
erase.keepNote: Anything you've edited will be kept.
erase.error: Something went wrong — nothing was removed. Please try again.

help.title: Ask Contentor
help.intro: Ask me anything about your Contentor site — I know your setup.
help.error: Something went wrong — please try again.
help.unavailable: The help chat isn't available right now. You can reach us at support@contentor.app.
help.quota: You've used this month's help-chat allowance. We're at support@contentor.app in the meantime.
help.suggestPublish: How do students find my site?

settings.title: Settings
settings.defaultLocaleDescription: New students inherit this language on first visit. Each student can override their preference.
settings.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.freeNotice: You're on the Free plan. Upgrade for more capacity.
subscription.checkoutCanceled: Checkout was canceled. Your plan was not changed.
subscription.error: Could not load subscription. Please try again.

changePlan.title: Change plan
changePlan.error: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
